programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E7 A Staticky Situation - A rainstorm keeps Chelsea from going outside, but that doesn't stop her from thinking about Dreamtopia! She arrives in the magical world to find an outbreak of static electricity that is causing everyone's hair to stick together and threatening to ruin their Disco Dance Party.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E8 The Lost Treasure of the Prism Princess - When sprinklers unexpectedly interrupt their soccer game, Chelsea and her friends must take cover in a small playhouse.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E9 Four Times the Chelsea - While Chelsea works with Otto on a puzzle, his know-it-all attitude has her wishing for a friend who is just like her. In Dreamtopia, Apprentice Queen Barbie grants that wish but accidentally creates three Chelsea clones.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E10 The Wispy Forest Hairathalon - At home, Chelsea is struggling to do a cartwheel but refuses Barbie's offer of help. Chelsea's imagination takes her to Dreamtopia where she finds herself participating in the Hairathalon.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E11 A Winning Color Combination - When they each open up a lemonade stand, Chelsea's lemonade is too sweet and Otto's too sour. In Dreamtopia, the color green is fading. Chelsea and the Rainbow Queen Barbie must convince a bickering Yellow and Blue Junior Rainbow Princesses to restore green and harmony to Rainbow Cove.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E12 The Damaged Spellbook - When Chelsea discovers that Otto has torn a page in a cookbook that he borrowed, she goes to Dreamtopia, where the Apprentice Queens perform an opposite spell that mysteriously goes haywire because Notto Prince covered up the fact that he tore a page from their spell book.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E13 Concert in the Clouds - When Otto gives Chelsea a hard time about her singing out loud, Chelsea goes to Rainbow Cove, where she is asked by Rainbow Queen Barbie to perform in a concert for the Cloud Council. With the help of her friends and Barbie, Chelsea finds the courage to sing out loud and proud.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E14 Forest Full of Friendship - While making friendship bracelets with Zoie, Chelsea imagines how they would share them in Dreamtopia. In Wispy Forest, friends create fantastical woven creations but struggle with sharing them until a talking tree needs help.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E15 Bearable Barry - Barbie's mismatched socks prompt Chelsea to think about having the confidence to be different. In Dreamtopia, Barry, a new Strawberry Bear in town, joins Chelsea and Princess Berry Swirl Barbie as they head out for a bear-filled boat outing.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E16 Glitter Ball Trouble - When Chelsea is asked by Zoie to watch over her egg incubator, Chelsea wonders what it would be like to be in Dreamtopia when baby Glitter Balls are hatching. She is asked by the Gem Fairy, Sapphire, to keep watch over the Glitter Ball Eggs.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E17 Unicorn in the Clouds - Chelsea, Barbie, and Otto take a trip to Rainbow Cove, where Rainbow Queen Barbie has commissioned a statue of the Winged Unicorn. When Chelsea and the Notto Prince disagree about what the sculpture should look like, they invite the Winged Unicorn to model for the sculpture.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E18 Sailing on a String - Chelsea imagines herself in Rainbow Cove where everyone is creating kites for that evening's ceremony. Chelsea and Rainbow Queen Barbie work together to build a kite, but put theirs aside to help the Notto Prince re-build his damaged kite.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E19 Rainbow Cove Games - When Otto keeps winning at a board game, Chelsea imagines herself in Rainbow Cove where she plays an imaginary team sport against Barbie and the Notto Prince, and in the process, learns to lead her team with fairness and a positive attitude.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E20 The Magic Seeds - When Chelsea and Barbie discover a strange seed pod in their yard, Chelsea imagines herself in Sweetville, where everyone is planting crops for the Country Fair. But when her planting of a magic seed yields a super-big pumpkin which is impossible to, Chelsea learns that bigger isn't always better.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E21 A Sound in Sweetville - Chelsea hears a scary noise coming from under her bed, and instead imagines herself in Sweetville where residents are hearing a strange noise which is causing the Candy Castle walls to shake apart.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E22 It's Not Easy Being Clean - As Chelsea helps Barbie clean up her room, she wishes there was a way to do it superfast. In Sparkle Mountain, the Apprentice Queens create a mess with their spell-testing.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E23 Magical Gifts of the Forest - When Barbie gives Chelsea a thoughtful gift for no particular reason, Chelsea imagines herself in Wispy Forest where everyone is picking someone to give a gift to.

programme.title: Barbie Dreamtopia
programme.desc: S1:E24 The Sweetville Parade - As Chelsea and her friends decorate their bikes, they wonder if they could have their own parade, leading Chelsea to Sweetville where she inspires the whole town to come up with ideas to make the best parade ever.

programme.title: Asterix: The Secret of the Magic Potion
programme.desc: After elderly druid Getafix falls out of a tree, he resolves to find a young successor to whom he can entrust the secret formula for the magic potion that makes his village the only one in Gaul still unconquered by the Romans.

programme.title: Air Bud
programme.desc: A lonely boy's life is transformed when he befriends a “wonder” dog who teaches him to play basketball.

programme.title: Big Momma's House
programme.desc: FBI agent Malcolm Turner is known best for being a brilliant, master of disguise. Malcolm's latest assignment sends him to small-town Georgia, where he's assigned to trap a brutal bank robber who the FBI suspects will be coming down to visit his ex-girlfriend Sherry and her son.

programme.title: You Don't Mess with the Zohan
programme.desc: A Mossad agent fakes his death so he can re-emerge in New York City as a hair stylist.

programme.title: Overboard
programme.desc: Unjustly fired by a spoilt and selfish yacht owner, Kate gets payback when he falls overboard and wakes up with amnesia...

programme.title: Hot Pursuit
programme.desc: An uptight and by-the-book cop (Reese Witherspoon) tries to protect the sexy and outgoing widow (Sofia Vergara) of a drug boss as they race through Texas pursued by crooked cops and murderous gunmen.

programme.title: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: Two strangers who drunkenly got married in Vegas fight over a huge jackpot after having their annulment denied by a judge.

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger heads to the small town of Helena to investigate a series of disappearances and murders of the local townsfolk. Starring Woody Harrelson and Liam Hemsworth (2016)

programme.title: King of Texas
programme.desc: A Western remake of King Lear, John Lear a wealthy cattle-baron has to deal with the betrayal of his family before he can settle his own affairs. Starring Patrick Stewart (2001).

programme.title: Last Days Of Frank and Jesse James, The
programme.desc: A western about the notorious bank robbers, Frank and Jesse James

programme.title: The Duel
programme.desc: A Texas Ranger heads to the small town of Helena to investigate a series of disappearances and murders of the local townsfolk. Starring Woody Harrelson and Liam Hemsworth (2016)

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: Jumper
programme.desc: The epic adventures of a man who discovers that he possesses the exhilarating ability to instantly teleport anywhere in the world he can imagine.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: One thousand years after cataclysmic events forced humanity's escape from Earth, Nova Prime has become mankind's new home. Legendary General Cypher Raige returns from an extended tour of duty to his estranged family, ready to be a father to his 13-year-old son, Kitai.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: In a future where time is literally money and aging stops at 25, the only way to stay alive is to earn, steal, or inherit more time.

programme.title: Watching Over You
programme.desc: Single mom Sarah moves into the suburbs and starts dating a firefighter, only to find herself the target of an obsessive neighborhood watchman who aims to prove he's the best man to protect her… even if he has to create the danger himself.

programme.title: The Missing Sister
programme.desc: When Sharon finally tracks down her missing sister Raven, she's elated to be back together – until she begins to suspect that Raven isn't her sister at all, but rather an opportunistic imposter.

programme.title: Bottle Shock
programme.desc: The story of the early days of California wine making featuring the now infamous, blind Paris wine tasting of 1976 that has come to be known as "Judgment of Paris". Feat: Chris Pine, Alan Rickman & Bill Pullman.

programme.title: The Last Legion
programme.desc: As the Roman empire collapses, young Romulus Augustus must leave the city and set out for a dangerous journey to Britain to locate his last legion of supporters.

programme.title: Legendary
programme.desc: Cal Chetley is a bright, engaging, undersized fifteen year-old who's been picked on most of his life. Cal joins his high school wrestling team in the hopes his brother will train him. More importantly, Cal uses wrestling as the tool to reunite his family.

programme.title: The Final Cut
programme.desc: Robin Williams, Mira Sorvino, and Jim Caviezel give dynamic performances in this mind-blowing thriller about the dark side of futuristic technology.

programme.title: In Time
programme.desc: Justin Timberlake and Amanda Seyfried co-star in this sci-fi thriller set in a future world where aging stops at 25, and the only way for one man to stay alive is to steal more time.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Free Fall
programme.desc: A woman gets targeted by a ruthless assassin and locked in the elevator after she uncovers a chilling secret.

programme.title: American Assassin
programme.desc: A CIA black-ops recruit uses his lethal skills to try and stop a rogue operative with a deadly agenda.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: In a chase through Los Angeles, Chev pursues a Chinese mobster who has stolen his nearly indestructible heart.

programme.title: Free Fall
programme.desc: A woman gets targeted by a ruthless assassin and locked in the elevator after she uncovers a chilling secret.

programme.title: Upside Down (2012)
programme.desc: Ever since Adam (Jim Sturgess) and Eden (Kirsten Dunst) fell in love as teens, their bond has faced astronomical odds. The pair are separated, not just by social class or the political system committed to keeping them apart, but also by a freak planetary condition: they live on twinned, parallel worlds with opposing gravitational forces. Years later, after suffering the pain of being torn apart, Adam decides to set out on a quest to once again find Eden and reconnect with his lost love.

programme.title: Wild Oats
programme.desc: Everything changes for Eva when she receives a life insurance check accidentally made out for five million dollars instead of the expected fifty thousand dollars. She and her best friend take the money and head out for the adventure of a lifetime.

programme.title: Call of The Wild
programme.desc: Call of The Wild is a modern-day story incorporating elements of Jack London's classic short novel. Whilst Ryann (Ariel Gade) is staying with her Grandpa Bill (Christopher Lloyd) a wild hybrid wolf/dog shows up injured on the back porch one night. Ryann and a local friend believe they can train the magnificent animal to become a sled dog leader but first they must try and persuade Grandpa, who knows the animal will eventually have to return to the wild. Then they must stand up to the local bully who wants to claim the dog as his own.

programme.title: Cold Brook
programme.desc: One fateful evening, after working late hours at the museum, two maintenance workers see a man standing silently near a Civil War exhibit. Despite chasing him away, each night he returns. Soon Ted and George learn that no one else can see the mysterious figure dressed in centuries-old clothing his name is Gil Le Doux and he's searching for a way home.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Arthur & Merlin: The Knights of Camelot
programme.desc: Starring Game of Thrones legend, Richard Brake. 463 AD, England. King Arthur has been absent for five long years, fighting a war that has stricken his knights, left his throne defenceless and his queen at the mercy of Modred. But as he fights to preserve Camelot - the toughest conflict is within himself. Guided by wizard Merlin, Arthur must strive to become the king that his nation needs.

programme.title: Proximity
programme.desc: Close Encounters of the Third Kind meets Independence Day. Earth is in danger and Isaac holds the key to unravelling the mystery that will expose the truth behind alien abduction. Once an unpopular cog in the machine of life Isaac now finds himself a wanted man and the only person that stands between human extinction at the hands of an extra-terrestrial threat. An invasion is coming!

programme.title: Mercury Plains
programme.desc: Hollywoods latest action hero proves the apple doesnt fall far from the tree in this explosive action thriller. Mitch (Scott Eastwood: Suicide Squad) is recruited to join a Mexican paramilitary group that fights drug cartels. But after proving himself and becoming a top soldier, he begins to have his doubts about the group's mission. A gripping thriller in the vein of Sicario - a must watch.

programme.title: Willy's Wonderland
programme.desc: Stranded in a remote town with a car that wont work and no way to pay the local repair shop, THE JANITOR agrees to spend the night in an abandoned theme park full of animatronic characters that were once a joy to the kids of the town, but now hold a dark secret. As night falls, these once happy mascots come to life and theyre out for blood. Survive at any cost, its only one night!

programme.title: Love By Accident
programme.desc: After breaking down on a road trip, a woman enlists the mechanic to be her fake boyfriend. Starring Henderson Wade (2020)

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: A young divorce mediator remains cynical until a client's dog pairs her with a local vet.

programme.title: The Way To The Heart
programme.desc: A struggling big-city chef returns to her hometown to rediscover her passion for food and reconnect with her father. Starring Meghan Heffern (2022)

programme.title: Wedding at The Hamptons
programme.desc: An aspiring fashion designer gets her chance to debut at a lavish Manhattan wedding where she is mistaken for a socialite and falls for a groomsman.

programme.title: Loving Every Minute
programme.desc: (2022) Fantastical romance with Jess Brown. Stephanie inherits a watch that allows her to travel back in time by five minutes, once a day. Will the tricky timepiece help or hinder her in romance?

programme.title: How to Find Forever
programme.desc: Marley's brilliant at organizing other people's engagements, but unlucky in finding romance herself. When designing her most important proposal yet, the man who could jeopardize it all may be the one who helps find her own love story.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Hint of Love
programme.desc: A cookbook literary agent with culinary training is tasked with helping elevate the brand of a food channel personality known for his convenience-oriented recipes. However, as the agent works with her client on a new cookbook, she must choose between following the directions or her heart.

programme.title: All for Love
programme.desc: When an engaged romance novelist is teamed with a Navy man as research for her latest book, she is taken aback by his boisterous personality and egotistical nature.

programme.title: Cooking with Love
programme.desc: Hardworking & optimistic television producer, Kelly, doesn't have time for love. Along with her mentor Amanda, Kelly dives into another season of the Little Gourmet, a kids cooking show, when hot-headed Chef Stephen is dropped into Kelly's life as a last minute replacement host.

programme.title: Love and Honor
programme.desc: While fighting in Vietnam, Dalton hears his girlfriend has dumped him so decides to fly to get her back. AWOL from the war zone, he has seven days to get back to the US, change his girlfriend's mind and make it back to Vietnam without anyone noticing

programme.title: The Loss Adjuster
programme.desc: Hapless Insurance Loss Adjuster - Martin Dyer - feels his life is spiralling out of control but discovers that even when you reach rock bottom, that some clouds really do have a silver lining.

programme.title: Groomzilla
programme.desc: A woman is surprised and dismayed when her fiance takes the planning of their wedding too seriously.

programme.title: For The Love Of Grace
programme.desc: After Grace Harding is saved from a fire by Steve Lockwood, a widowed firefighter, they teach each other to embrace life as they fall in love.

programme.title: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage counselor attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Braving Rapids
programme.desc: A family goes on a river rafting trip as they process a great loss. Along the way they find a wolf pup. When some unscrupulous folks spot the wolf as well and conspire to steal and sell it, the family and guides fight to protect the pup. Could their journey to deliver the wolf safely to wildlife officials be just the thing to guide them to healing?

programme.title: Beauty and the Billionaire: Bali
programme.desc: American doctor Ivy Miller lives in Bali, working at a charitable health clinic. When a billionaire benefactor named Dylan Donnelly arrives, Ivy is less than impressed. He is only interested in making himself look better by appearing charitable. Ivy is happy when he goes on his way, but then an accident injures one of Dylan's trusted advisors, Blake. Dylan insists Ivy stay at Dylan's lavish estate in Bali to care for Blake until he's well.

programme.title: Sinister Minister
programme.desc: True story: Single mother Trish falls for DJ, unaware he's a serial wife killer.

programme.title: Pastor Brown
programme.desc: A preacher's daughter returns home to take over as pastor of the family church.

programme.title: Lovely Little Liars
programme.desc: A high school history teacher's perfect life is disrupted by a sex scandal.

programme.title: The Preacher's Mistress
programme.desc: Gwen Griffith is a single mom studying for her insurance license, amidst work.

programme.title: Sinister Minister
programme.desc: True story: Single mother Trish falls for DJ, unaware he's a serial wife killer.

programme.title: The Great New Wonderful
programme.desc: The Great New Wonderful weaves five stories against the backdrop of an anxious and uncertain post-9-11 New York City.

programme.title: The Music in Me
programme.desc: A singer/songwriter leaves her dreams behind to help her family, until one special guy and a group of musically-challenged strangers help her find her voice again.

programme.title: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.title: Wish You Were Dead
programme.desc: Hayley Udall tries to make ends meet for herself and her 14 year-old daughter while providing alimony for a horrible ex-husband. She wishes her problems with her ex could go away, and upon venting her frustrations one night, finds herself tangled up in a pact with two people (Melanie and Kevin) to “eliminate” each other's problems.

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Events planner Kelly meets her match in web editor Joe when planning his niece's birthday party.

programme.title: The House Bunny
programme.desc: The story of a Playboy Bunny who teaches an awkward sorority about the opposite sex - only to learn that what boys really like is what's on the inside.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) meets the girl of his dreams (Brooklyn Decker) but has to enlist his loyal assistant Katherine (Jennifer Aniston) to pretend to be his soon-to-be ex-wife in order to cover up a careless lie. When more lies backfire, Katherine's kids become involved, and everyone heads off to Hawaii for a ridiculous, out-of-control weekend that tests the limits of how far we'll go for love.

programme.title: 50 First Dates
programme.desc: A Hawaiian island playboy has to use his imagination to win over the girl of his dreams when he discovers she has no short-term memory. Every night he is erased from her memory so he has to make her fall in love with him all over again the next day...and the next...and the next!

programme.title: Sydney White
programme.desc: In a college comedy that puts a modern-day twist on an age-old story, Sydney White tells the tale of a tomboy freshman who ditches her conniving sorority sisters and finds a new home with a group of very dorky outcasts. Fed up with the way they've all been treated, she's off to war against the reigning campus royalty.

programme.title: The Lonesome Trail
programme.desc: Johnny Rush, an Indian wars veteran, returns home to find his land seized by a cattle baron and his love engaged to the enemy. After a brutal fight leaves him unable to use his gun arm, Rush learns to wield a bow and arrow with deadly precision. Determined to reclaim his home and confront betrayal, he fights back against overwhelming odds.

programme.title: Gentleman Killer
programme.desc: A quiet border town erupts into chaos as tensions rise between the US and Mexico. The cause? A ruthless Mexican bandit determined to kill as many US soldiers as possible. As political turmoil intensifies, the town becomes the center of a deadly conflict, where vengeance, power, and survival collide.

programme.title: Bounty Hunter in Trinity
programme.desc: The townsfolk of Trinity decide to hire a notorious bounty hunter to protect them from a fierce band of Mexican outlaws who are terrorizing the area.

programme.title: Djurado
programme.desc: Djurado is a gun-slinging professional gambler who struts into the small town of Silver Mine and wins half of the local saloon, the other part of which belongs to Barbara, whilst battling notorious outlaw Tucan.

programme.title: For a Book of Dollars
programme.desc: A bounty hunter named Amen is hired by a group of nuns to recover stolen money. However, the nuns turn out to be female desperadoes in disguise, plotting to retrieve the booty pillaged by the ruthless outlaw Catapult and his gang. Amen must navigate a world of deception, danger, and betrayal to complete the job.

programme.title: Yield to the Night
programme.desc: The powerful story of a young woman who falls madly in love with an impoverished pianist, only to find that he is involved with a rich socialite who in turn ignores and encourages him until, in desperation, he commits suicide.

programme.title: No Place for Jennifer
programme.desc: Distraught after her parents' divorce, nine-year-old Jennifer becomes increasingly neurotic and is sent to a center for maladjusted children.

programme.title: DAYBREAK
programme.desc: Eddie is a man with a secret - his second job is that of public hangman. When he falls into the canal following a fight with a youth over his wife, his body is not found. A thriller with unexpected twists.

programme.title: Boys in Brown
programme.desc: An all-star cast spearhead this exercise in social realism. Jackie (Richard Attenborough) dreams of marrying the girl across the street but, in a bid to escape the poverty trap, agrees to participate in a robbery that goes wrong

programme.title: Hunted
programme.desc: When six-year-old Robbie runs away he stumbles upon a man, Chris, with a dead body. Scared that Robbie will report him, he takes him. They become close as they spend time together and when Robbie becomes ill, Chris has to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Five young people find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack.

programme.title: Skyman
programme.desc: The story of Carl who believes he experienced an alien encounter at 10-years-old and is now trying to reconnect with the UFO as the same location.

programme.title: Dominion: The Last Star Warrior
programme.desc: In five days the world changed. As a retired Intelligence agent turned UFO investigator races to discover the fate of the human race, an alien observer searchs for the human woman he loves.

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by the innocence of those who live there, two young people become entangled in the ongoing battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: 'Above the Shadows' is a magic realism tale about a young woman who has faded to the point of becoming invisible and must find her way back into the world.

programme.title: Emma Fielding Mystery: More Bitter Than Death
programme.desc: Emma Fielding must find the killer after the president of the Association for the Study of American Archaeology is murdered. Starring Courtney Thorne-Smith (2019)

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective: Death Al Dente
programme.desc: A culinary expert finds himself at the heart of another murder mystery when he is hired to find the best Italian chef for a new high-end eatery. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2016)

programme.title: Fixer Upper Mysteries: Framed For Murder
programme.desc: After the body of her friend's father is found in a mansion she is hired to fix, Shannon Hughes must investigate a potential murder. Starring Jewel (2017)

programme.title: Murder 101: If Wishes Were Horses
programme.desc: A criminology professor and a private detective work together to try and solve a disappearance.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The International
programme.desc: An Interpol agent (Owen) attempts to expose a high-profile financial institution's role in an international arms dealing ring.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.: Under Siege
programme.desc: A police compound comes under siege after a double agent for the cartel is brought into custody.

programme.title: Starship Troopers: Traitor of Mars
programme.desc: A distant Federation outpost Fort Casey comes under attack by bugs. The team on the fast attack ship Alesia is assigned to help the Starship John A. Warden stationed in Fort Casey evacuate along with the survivors and bring military intelligence safely back to Earth. Carl Jenkins, now ministry of Paranormal Warfare, takes the starship on a clandestine mission before its rendezvous with the Alesia and goes missing in the nebula. Now, the battle-hardened troopers are charged with a rescue mission that may lead to a much more sinister consequence than they ever could have imagined...

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A platoon of Marines battles an alien invasion on the streets of Los Angeles.

programme.title: A Single Man
programme.desc: Previously featured at the London Film Festival. A SINGLE MAN, tells the story of a British professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events leads him to decide if there is meaning to life after the death of his partner,Jim.

programme.title: Freeheld
programme.desc: Diagnosed with terminal cancer, decorated New Jersey detective Laurel Hester (Julianne Moore) wishes to leave her pension benefits to domestic partner Stacie Andree (Elliot Page).

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: "The Match" tells the story of the true events which transpired in the spring of 1944 when Nazis organized a football match between the Hungarian prisoners and an elite Nazi team to commemorate Adolf Hitler's birthday.

programme.title: 3 Generations
programme.desc: Naomi Watts, Elle Fanning, and Susan Sarandon star in this inspirational, witty, and courageous look at a family learning to accept a transgender teen for who he is.

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb
programme.desc: An innocent discovery of a well-preserved mummified Emperor from 200 B.C. China unearths a two thousand-year-old nightmare, a secret that should have remained buried.

programme.title: Vantage Point
programme.desc: The attempted assassination of the president is told from five different perspectives.

programme.title: Kingsglaive: Final Fantasy XV
programme.desc: The magical kingdom of Lucis is home to the sacred Crystal, and the menacing empire of Niflheim is determined to steal it. King Regis of Lucis (Sean Bean) commands an elite force of soldiers called the Kingsglaive..

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former protégé to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: S16 E19 Cumbria
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton visits Appleby Horse Fair, aiding house hunters.

programme.title: S13 E8 Hampshire
programme.desc: Jules aids young family seeking Hampshire home with safe garden for £600K.

programme.title: S14 E10 Buckinghamshire
programme.desc: Couple seeks property in Buckinghamshire for £600,000 to keep goats.

programme.title: S15 E20 Oxfordshire
programme.desc: Retired couple seeks peace and quiet in Oxfordshire.

programme.title: S18 E12 Suffolk
programme.desc: Nicki aids newly-weds' spacious country home hunt in Suffolk.

programme.title: S3 E36 Cardiff to Herefordshire
programme.desc: Arun is a bit of a property expert, and he and his wife Rita want to move to Herefordshire where Arun plans to raise pet pigs! So he needs outbuildings and land as well as a house which is full of character.

programme.title: S11 E20 Cotswolds
programme.desc: Nicki helps couple relocate business to Cotswolds with period character home at £800k.
